description_long: This object depicts an adult human figure lying flat with arms outstretched and legs slightly apart. The figure is dressed in a short-sleeved shirt and shorts, with no visible footwear. The head is bald and a separate, rounded cap-like object is positioned near the head, suggesting a removable accessory or part. The facial features are minimalistic, with a small nose and mouth visible. The overall form is stylized and simplified, with smooth surfaces and rounded limbs, typical of a cartoon or toy-like representation.
description: A stylized adult human figure lying flat with outstretched arms, wearing a short-sleeved shirt and shorts, and featuring a bald head with a separate cap-like object nearby.
description_view_0: View from the feet looking toward the head, showing the outstretched arms, shorts, and the cap-like object above the head.
description_view_1: Side view from the left, highlighting the profile of the body, the arm extended outward, and the cap-like object floating near the head.
description_view_2: View from the head looking toward the feet, showing the face, chest, and the cap-like object to the right of the head.
description_view_3: Side view from the right, showing the body profile, the right arm extended, and the cap-like object floating to the left of the head.
